reviews.title: Subscription too expensive
reviews.content: The workout plans are great but the subscription is way too expensive compared to other fitness apps. I can't justify $9.99/month when there are similar apps for $4.99.
reviews.author: FitnessFan22

reviews.title: App crashes during workouts
reviews.content: Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes. This is so frustrating, I've lost my workout progress multiple times. iPhone 14, iOS 17.4.
reviews.author: YogaLover99

reviews.title: Great variety of workouts
reviews.content: I really like the variety of workout plans available. The trainers are motivating and the video quality is excellent. Would give 5 stars if there were more beginner-friendly options.
reviews.author: NewToFitness

reviews.title: Can't cancel subscription
reviews.content: I've been trying to cancel my subscription for 2 weeks. The cancel button in settings doesn't work, and customer support hasn't responded to my emails. This feels like a scam.
reviews.author: AngryUser123

reviews.title: Good but needs offline mode
reviews.content: The workouts are effective and I've seen results in 2 weeks. However, I often exercise in places with poor internet and the app is unusable without a connection. Please add offline downloads!
reviews.author: TravelFit

reviews.title: Audio out of sync with video
reviews.content: In several workouts the trainer's audio is 2-3 seconds behind the video. It makes it really hard to follow along. This happens on both WiFi and cellular data.
reviews.author: TechRunner

reviews.title: Perfect for home workouts
reviews.content: As a busy mom, this app is perfect. I can do 15-minute workouts while the baby naps. The home gym equipment needed is minimal. Love the weekly challenges!
reviews.author: BusyMomLife

reviews.title: Charged twice for subscription
reviews.content: I was charged twice for the annual subscription ($79.99 x 2). Customer support is non-existent. I've disputed the charge with Apple. DO NOT SUBSCRIBE until they fix their billing.
reviews.author: DoubleCharged

reviews.title: Needs more customization
reviews.content: The preset workout plans are fine but I wish I could create custom workouts or at least swap out exercises I don't like. Sometimes the recommended weights are way off for my fitness level.
reviews.author: CustomFitness

reviews.title: Calorie tracking integration needed
reviews.content: I track my calories in MyFitnessPal and wish this app would sync workout data there. Having to manually log everything is tedious. Otherwise great app with solid workouts.
reviews.author: DataDrivenFit

reviews.title: Workout timer freezes
reviews.content: The rest timer between sets keeps freezing. I'll think 30 seconds have passed and it's actually been 3 minutes. Makes interval training impossible. This bug has been there for months.
reviews.author: IntervalKing

reviews.title: Misleading free trial
reviews.content: The app says '7-day free trial' but it charged me immediately. When I tried to get a refund, I was told it was in the terms. Very misleading marketing. The workouts themselves are decent.
reviews.author: TrialTrap

reviews.title: Great results in 30 days
reviews.content: I've been using this app for 30 days and I can already see real results. The progressive overload system works well. The meal plan suggestions are a nice bonus too.
reviews.author: ResultsDriven

reviews.title: Needs better Apple Watch support
reviews.content: The Apple Watch app is basically useless. It only shows heart rate but doesn't track reps, sets, or rest time. I end up having to use my phone anyway, which defeats the purpose.
reviews.author: WatchUser

reviews.title: Video quality drops randomly
reviews.content: On a 100Mbps connection, the video quality still drops to what looks like 240p sometimes. Other streaming apps work fine. Seems like a CDN or encoding issue on their end.
reviews.author: QualityMatters
